title: elsholtzia eriostachya
intro: Elsholtzia eriostachya, also known as Thai basil or Vietnamese basil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elsholtzia eriostachya include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Elsholtzia eriostachya can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
